## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) and Anoushka Vaswani (Lightspeed Venture Partners) to discuss GrowthX's business model, growth, and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has rapidly grown to $7M ARR, 50 employees, and \~50 customers in less than a year](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Two-sided business: customer-facing content services + underlying tech platform/workflow engine](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Recently raised $12M Series A at $80M post-money valuation, aiming for $20M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Exploring expansion into new verticals (e.g., sales) and potential future fundraising for M\&A](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background and GrowthX Origin

  - [Brazilian-born, moved to Texas at 11](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Built organic content engines throughout career (IBM, ServiceTitan, HashiCorp, Scale AI, Deepgram)](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Started GrowthX by teaching workshops, evolved into full-service offering](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Partnered with CTO Daniel (ex-IFTTT) to build underlying tech platform](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)

### GrowthX Business Model

  - [Two sides: customer-facing content services + underlying tech platform](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Focuses on delivering outcomes, not just tools or partial solutions](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Uses expert-driven "managing director" model for service delivery](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [Underlying platform: workflow engine, runtime layer, IDE experience, services/workflows](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Learning engine captures insights from workflow execution and expert input](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)

### Customer Base and Offering

  - [Diverse customer base: Series A startups to public companies (e.g., Webflow, Ramp, Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - $160K ACV, 48% win rate, \<30-day sales cycle
  - [Full-service approach: strategy, execution, and "grunt work" (e.g., content staging, optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Team structure: Managing Directors lead pods of specialists (editors, strategists, researchers)](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)

### Growth and Funding

  - [Crossed $7M ARR, still profitable (may start burning cash due to rapid growth)](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Raised $12M Series A at $80M post-money valuation](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Aiming for $20M ARR, exploring new verticals (e.g., sales) and platform exposure](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
  - [Considering future Series B for M\&A, geographic expansion, and talent acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)

### Future Plans and Strategy

  - [Three-pronged approach:](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
    1.  Scale current offering to $20M ARR
    2.  Expand into new vertical/domain (possibly sales)
    3.  Further develop and expose the underlying platform
  - [Exploring international opportunities (e.g., Mexico, UK)](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Considering M\&A to acquire expertise and accelerate growth in specific niches](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel and Anoushka to meet in person after GrowthX's board meeting on April 20th](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [Explore potential collaborations with Lightspeed portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Continue discussions on GrowthX's growth strategy and future funding plans](https://fathom.video/share/pdxcz7ZXEhtwyZExE4xsmmQkXyfxEpAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
